claims: Defines RestrictedFiniteDetectorExtractionGateFromBudget as a finite arithmetic gate certificate.
Proves DetectorBudgetCompatible implies the restricted finite-detector extraction-gate certificate.
Proves every extracted finite detector witness induces the restricted finite-detector extraction-gate certificate.
Exposes nonnegative active mass from the restricted gate.
Exposes detector-id length agreement with partition cell count from the restricted gate.
Exposes sample-count agreement with finite support size from the restricted gate.
Exposes detector-cell count agreement with partition cell count from the restricted gate.
Proves empty-data active mass is zero through the restricted gate.
